headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Rollins, Lowers Price Target to $46
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Rollins (NYSE:ROL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $55 to $46.
